title: Cookiequad Multisig
content:
Cookiequad Multisig
Cookiequad Multisig
Creating teams, managing members and handling proposals on-chain.
Create your team, set permissions, and manage vaults with an intuitive interface.
0
FEES
ALL
TRANSPARENT
on
COOKIE
CHAIN
Create Multisig
Manage Existing Multisig
Community Wallet
How It Works
Understand the multisig flow
1. Create a multisig with members, permissions, threshold, and optional authorities.
2. Fund a vault PDA and create proposals for transfers or configuration changes.
3. Members approve or reject proposals based on their voting permission.
4. Once a proposal is approved and any time lock has passed, an executor can run it.
What You Can Do
Core capabilities included
Create autonomous or controlled multisigs.
View members, permissions, vault balances, spending limits, and proposals.
Create vault transfer proposals and config proposals.
Approve, reject, cancel, activate, and execute proposals.
Use existing spending limits directly from the UI.
Home
Start here
Use this page to understand the app and navigate the workflow.
Create Multisig
Set up your team
Add members, choose permissions, set threshold, and create a new multisig with Backpack.
Go to creation page
Community Wallet
View Cookiequad treasury
Inspect the community multisig in read-only mode, or connect a member wallet to approve and execute allowed actions.
Go to community page
Manage Multisig
Handle proposals
Load an existing multisig PDA and manage proposals, vault transfers, members, and limits.
Go to management page

title: Saved by Simplex.gor [alcapawn] via /cj
content: Let's change the narrative on the "Fork of Gorbagana", to we are the Orgiginal Solana Fork  Gorbaganas current version is a Fork of us.   @Sarvshaktimaan created a validator and RPC, and the current controller of the chain spent four months converting that to Laconic.  Cookienet/cookiechain is not a Fork of Gorbagana, we are the original code base and a Fork of Soloana.  The first one.   We not a back seat to Gorbagana.  We are back from the 9 month Laconic sabbatical, and taking back the original vision, a community run chain that is taking community members back that wants to come along.
